name: Verify User can uninstall app via UI
description:
### Pre-conditions:
- Shell app installed.

### Steps:
- Login with valid credentials.
- Click `Installed Apps` button.
- Click `Details` button on installed app container.
- Click `Uninstall` button.

### Verify that:

- Shell app uninstalled.
descriptionHtml:
Pre-conditions:

  • Shell app installed.

Steps:

  • Login with valid credentials.
  • Click Installed Apps button.
  • Click Details button on installed app container.
  • Click Uninstall button.

Verify that:

  • Shell app uninstalled.
